steps.t: Éowyn can be found on the Firienfeld at Dunharrow. You have arrived at Dunharrow, and now Éowyn wishes to speak with you.
Éowyn is standing outside Dimholt at Dunharrow. You should talk to Éowyn.
Éowyn can be found outside the Dark Door in the Dimholt. You have defeated the Orc-leader and brought peace to the people of Kingstead.
